title: Strategy
text: A shift of 3 to the right during encoding means each letter was replaced by the one three positions later in the alphabet. To decode, think about moving each letter three positions back instead.

title: Procedure
text: Write down the encoded word. For each letter, count three letters to the left in the alphabet (wrap around from A ↔ Z). Replace each encoded letter with the letter you land on to form the decoded word.
